plugins.name: datadog-log-analyst
plugins.description: Analyse Datadog logs for Prismatic integrations with streaming accumulator for million-log datasets. Includes skills for fetching, analysing (SAP, AMT, Maximo, generic), and reporting to chat, Slack, Notion, or DOCX. Requires the Datadog Connector extension for MCP access.

plugins.name: mcp-connector-builder
plugins.description: Skill for building and packaging custom MCP servers as Claude Desktop Extension bundles (.mcpb). Guides you through scaffolding, manifest.json spec 0.3, mcpb CLI, and team distribution.
